project: Abela Pre & Primary School V3 photo library
rules: Use free/paid stock images only when the license allows school website usage.
Do not copy real Feza, Aga Khan, IST, or Braeburn student photos without written permission.
Replace all remote placeholders with real Abela photos before production launch.
